overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai character running through a snowy winter landscape. The character travels along a forest path, passes through a traditional Japanese torii gate, and enters a rocky mountain pass during an overcast snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered forest trail with bare trees

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the snowy forest path with a bow visible on their back, surrounded by snow-laden trees

entered.detail: tall bare trees with heavy snow on branches lining both sides of the path
partially cleared dirt trail with snow on the edges and footprints in the center
low bushes and shrubs covered in snow flanking the trail

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a winding trail through a dense winter forest. Snow covers the ground and bare trees line both sides of the path, with diffuse overcast light filtering through the branches. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with no other characters or structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning to rocky shrine approach

events.description: large rocky outcrops become visible on the right side of the path as the forest opens up
traditional red wooden torii gate comes into view in the distance ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the path toward the shrine gate now visible ahead on the right

entered.detail: large snow-dusted boulders and rock formations emerging on the right side of the trail
traditional Japanese shrine gate with red wooden beams and white shimenawa ropes with bells

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the character approaches a shrine area. Large rocky outcrops appear on the right, and a traditional red torii gate becomes visible in the distance ahead. The path remains snow-covered but the vegetation becomes sparser as the terrain transitions to a more mountainous rocky landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain pass beyond torii gate with large boulders

events.description: character passes under the torii gate entering the enclosed rocky mountain pass beyond

agents.ego_description: passing through the torii gate and continuing into the narrow rocky mountain pass

entered.detail: traditional stone lantern positioned near the torii gate entrance
massive snow-covered boulders forming a narrow mountain pass

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the torii gate, leaving the forest behind and entering a narrow mountain pass enclosed by massive snow-covered boulders. A traditional stone lantern stands near the gate entrance. The path continues through the rocky terrain with sparse vegetation, creating a more enclosed and rugged atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense winter forest that gradually opens into a rugged, rocky mountain pass. It begins with the character running along a winding trail beneath bare trees and diffuse overcast light, where the atmosphere is quiet and isolated. As the forest thins, the terrain shifts toward a mountainous landscape with large rocky outcrops appearing on the right and a red torii gate emerging in the distance. The scene then expands as the character passes a traditional stone lantern and moves under the gate, leaving the woods behind. Finally, the path narrows into a rugged pass enclosed by massive snow-covered boulders and sparse vegetation.
